summary: Coty is facing margin pressure, as evidenced by declines in gross and EBITDA margins. To combat this, they are implementing cost-saving measures, including job cuts and supply chain efficiencies. While they aim to return to growth in the second half of FY26, they are also experiencing resource constraints and have withdrawn their FY26 guidance.
